name: agentic-factory
description: Database-backed agentic software factory operations with structured events, baton state, reviews, verification history, pause/resume controls, and markdown ledger rendering.

interface.shortDescription: Run durable agentic factories with SQLite-backed ledgers.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Factory adds executable infrastructure for long-running agent-driven software builds: a structured SQLite event store, current-state queries, baton assignment and handoff commands, review and verification records, pause/resume checkpoints, doctor checks, and markdown ledger rendering. The bundled skill includes the minimum operating model, so the plugin works without private skill dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Record this baton handoff in the factory DB
